description: A farmer wants to create a 4-year crop rotation plan for their fields to improve soil health and break pest cycles.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the last 3 years of cropping history for all of the farmer's fields.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the historical data for each field.

nodes.task_description: Identify the farmer's goals (e.g., maximize corn acres, include a legume, manage soybean cyst nematode).
Generate a 4-year crop rotation plan for each field that meets the farmer's goals and follows best agronomic practices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed plan, such as Corn -> Soybeans -> Wheat -> Alfalfa for a specific field.
